summary: Mis-tracked recording with incorrect track listings; no musical details provided
review: The sole reviewer notes that the tracks are mis‑tracked, with songs mislabeled from "Wheel" onward and even the encore listed incorrectly. No comments on sound quality or performance were given, so listeners cannot assess the show itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focused on track‑listing errors; no positive aspects mentioned, indicating a poor overall experience.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tracks are mis‑tracked and mislabeled, making navigation difficult; no audio quality comments provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information on set structure or performance quality was given.
